opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These red circles are spreading all over his legs, and he is scratching them so hard they are bleeding. He won't stop crying from the itch.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The rings have spread really fast over the last few days and he's scratched them raw and bleeding — I'm scared it's some serious spreading infection and I want it sorted tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: a small red scaly patch appeared on his right thigh about 10 days ago
symptom_narrative.duration: about 10 days, but it has spread fast over the last 5 days
symptom_narrative.character: red circular patches with a scaly raised outer edge and clearer, more normal-looking skin in the middle; very itchy
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the itch is unbearable — he scratches until the edges bleed and he cries
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both legs now — the thighs and the lower legs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the itch is constant and the rings keep getting bigger and spreading outwards each day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really seems to help the itch
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching makes the edges raw and they bleed and weep
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever that I've noticed; he's otherwise well, eating and playing normally
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he's never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he isn't sleeping properly because the itch is so bad

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: an active 7-year-old who plays outdoors in soil and grass a lot; lives at home with his parents

objective_data_offered.value: multiple coin-sized red circular patches on both legs, each with a scaly raised outer edge and clearer skin in the centre; some edges have been scratched raw with pinpoint bleeding and a little crusting
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen on a phone video in variable lighting, not a clinician's close skin examination

objective_data_offered.value: he doesn't feel hot to me and I haven't measured a fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: carer impression by touch, not a thermometer reading

objective_data_offered.value: he is alert, playing and eating normally, just very itchy and upset
he has dirt under his fingernails from playing outside
